market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Highly suppressed volatility expected due to massive positive Total GEX (3.46B), leading to tight price pinning.
outlook.summary: The market is trapped in a highly stable, dealer-controlled state. Positive GEX across all expiries aggressively suppresses volatility. Spot is strictly pinned at the massive 680 resonance level. Despite extremely bearish put/call ratios and volatility smirks indicating fear, dealer hedging creates an impenetrable support floor, while Call Walls cap the upside.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put (153k) and Call (56k) Open Interest cluster precisely at the spot pinning level across all expirations.
Dominant Call OI across all expirations (46k+ total) acts as a rigid ceiling against upward price progression.
Extreme Put OI in 0DTE (42k) and Monthly (42k) creates a high-probability institutional support floor.
Weekly Gamma Flip at 686.1 aligns with major 0DTE Call OI (19.4k), creating a dealer hedging resistance barrier.
Strong Put OI in 0DTE and Monthly converges near the Monthly Max Pain (669), establishing a structural anchor.
Massive Monthly Put OI (129k) combined with a bearish volatility smirk defines the absolute downside tail risk boundary.
0DTE Max Pain level acting as a gravitational pull for intraday price action as options approach expiration.
Intraday friction level with high 0DTE Put OI (27.8k) absorbing selling pressure between Spot and Max Pain.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive short-term GEX suppresses moves.
outlook.summary: The market is trapped between the converged 0DTE/WEEKLY Gamma Flip at ~6845 and the massive 6900 Monthly Call Wall/Max Pain. Positive GEX in short-term expiries dictates dealer mean-reversion behavior, keeping prices range-bound today despite an underlying bearish volatility skew. A sustained break below 6845 targets the 6800 high-friction zone.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI in 0DTE and MONTHLY aligns perfectly with the Monthly Max Pain. Acts as a magnetic ceiling and primary resistance.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Call Wall + Max Pain

levels.motivazione: Highest absolute Call Open Interest in the 0DTE expiration. Serves as the strict intraday upside limit.
0DTE and WEEKLY Gamma Flips converge exactly here, marking the critical structural inflection and intraday support.
Significant Put/Call OI across all expirations, highlighted by massive 0DTE Put volume (34k). High friction and hedging zone.
Major Put defense level in both 0DTE and MONTHLY expirations. Deep institutional support boundary.
Monumental Put OI in the MONTHLY expiration (113k) creates a massive structural floor and volatility trigger.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MM DEFENSE: Massive monthly put OI

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to strongly positive Total GEX across all expiries.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a bullish posture driven by a 'reverse_smirk' skew in the 0DTE expiration and positive Total GEX (1.61B). Heavy Call OI at and below the spot price creates a supportive delta-hedge environment. The primary Call Wall at 25500 is the main upside barrier, while structural supports are well-established below 24600. Near-term direction favors continuation towards the major resistance, backed by dealer long gamma positioning.

levels.motivazione: Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (226) and significant OI in WEEKLY (75) and MONTHLY (49). Primary upside barrier reinforced by positive GEX.
Highest volume in 0DTE (616) with heavy OI (181), indicating an immediate friction level just below the spot.
Significant 0DTE Call OI (158) and high volume (441), combined with notable MONTHLY Call OI (133). Acts as a price attractor.
Highest 0DTE Put Volume (338) and WEEKLY Put OI (20) define a key structural support level.
Largest 0DTE Put OI (240) forms a hard downside boundary. MONTHLY Call OI (37) adds structural importance.
Dominant MONTHLY Call OI (357) limits upside expansion for the mid-term timeframe.
WEEKLY Gamma Flip level indicating the exact pivot point for dealer hedging shifts.
Massive MONTHLY Call OI (4009) acts as a deep price magnet, while Put OI (59) reinforces the structural base.
